build_system: npm with TypeScript compiler (tsc). Must unset NODE_OPTIONS before running commands.
test_framework: Jest 30 with ts-jest 29, using aws-cdk-lib/assertions Template.fromStack() for CDK assertion testing. Snapshot test also exists. Config uses setupFilesAfterEnv: aws-cdk-lib/testhelpers/jest-autoclean.
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'unset NODE_OPTIONS && npx jest --no-coverage' - all tests must pass. 2. Run 'unset NODE_OPTIONS && npx cdk synth' - must succeed. 3. Snapshot must be updated if template changes.
snapshot_or_generated_files: test/__snapshots__/cdk-base.test.ts.snap - auto-updated by jest with --updateSnapshot flag when template changes. Run 'unset NODE_OPTIONS && npx jest --no-coverage --updateSnapshot' to regenerate.
setup_instructions: 1. cd /projects/sandbox/cdk-sleep-ts-kiro 2. unset NODE_OPTIONS 3. npm install (already done)
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode - can install npm packages. Must always 'unset NODE_OPTIONS' before running node/npm/npx commands due to proxy-bootstrap.js issue in sandbox.
contribution_requirements: Strict TDD: write failing tests first, then minimal implementation. Conventional commits required. ARCHITECTURE.md must be updated for any infrastructure changes. Prefer L2/L3 CDK constructs. Least-privilege IAM.
key_patterns: CDK stack in lib/cdk-base-stack.ts. Tests in test/cdk-base.test.ts use Template.fromStack() with describe/test blocks. Lambda code in lambda/audio-processor/index.ts. State machine uses CDK tasks module (DynamoPutItem, CallAwsService, LambdaInvoke, DynamoUpdateItem, SnsPublish). Error handling via addCatch() with resultPath. Current flow: WriteMetadata -> Polly -> ProcessAudio -> UpdateStatus -> NotifySuccess -> Done. Error paths use Mark Failed -> Notify Failure -> Pipeline Failed.
directory_structure: bin/ - CDK app entry point. lib/ - CDK stack definitions. lambda/audio-processor/ - Lambda handler code. test/ - Jest test files with __snapshots__/ for snapshot tests. .github/ - CI workflows and agent guidelines.
